title: Rename device - Rename, max chars
scenario: Device name can be renamed with up to 30 bytes (30 English characters) via Device Settings > General and persists after tapping Done
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field
Enter a new device name using exactly 30 English characters (e.g., 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ1234')
Tap Done to save the name change
Verify the device name displayed on the Home screen
expected: The device name is updated to the new 30-character name and displayed correctly on the Home screen and in Device Settings.
